history.change: R-UNIFY GAP-B: ADD platform/platform_uid/source to bizcity_crm_contacts; ADD platform/channel_thread_id/chat_id/contact_id/account_id/blog_id to bizcity_crm_conversations; ADD platform/platform_msg_id/body/payload_json to bizcity_crm_messages. Fix: Unknown column 'platform' in INSERT/WHERE.
PHASE-0.46 M1: ADD bizcity_crm_activities + bizcity_crm_submissions tables.
ADD action_flags_json + delay_sec to bizcity_crm_broadcasts; ADD scheduled_send_at + idx_scheduled_send to bizcity_crm_broadcast_recipients.

bizcity_crm_broadcasts.purpose: Broadcast job header. One row per campaign message blast. Segments by inbox, label, lead_score, segment. Dispatched via POST /broadcasts/{id}/send which enqueues individual messages.

inbox_ids_json.comment: JSON array of inbox IDs to send from. NULL = all inboxes.

status.comment: draft | scheduled | sending | sent | failed | cancelled

action_flags_json.comment: JSON: {send_message, send_friend_request, invite_group, group_id}. NULL = fallback {send_message:true}.

delay_sec.comment: Seconds between consecutive recipient sends. Range 5–180.

bizcity_crm_broadcast_recipients.purpose: Per-recipient send ledger for a broadcast. One row per (broadcast, contact). Tracks actual delivery status for bounce/retry reporting.

conversation_id.comment: Set when message is sent to an existing/new conversation.

scheduled_send_at.comment: Calculated as enqueue time + (row_index * delay_sec). Dispatcher only processes rows WHERE scheduled_send_at <= NOW().

idx_scheduled_send.comment: Tick query: WHERE status='queued' AND scheduled_send_at <= NOW()

bizcity_crm_audit_log.purpose: Immutable audit trail for CRM entity mutations (leads/opportunities/contracts/contacts). Feeds AuditTimeline FE component via GET /audit. Written by BizCity_CRM_Audit_Log::log().

before_json.comment: JSON of changed fields before mutation (null for created)

after_json.comment: JSON of changed fields after mutation (null for deleted)

user_label.comment: WP display_name at time of action (denorm)

bizcity_crm_leads.purpose: Raw inbound prospect (pre-qualified). Source of records for /bizcity-crm/v1/crm-leads.

source.comment: Adapter code: messenger | dino_tichdiem | user_points | manual | ...

source_ref.comment: External primary key inside source (FB PSID, phone, dino phone_number, user_points.id). UNIQUE with `source` for idempotent upsert by adapter sync.

uniq_source_ref.comment: Idempotent upsert key for Customer Source adapter sync.

bizcity_crm_opportunities.purpose: Deal in pipeline. Kanban groups by `stage`. Adapter-synced rows carry (source, source_ref) for idempotent upsert; stage auto-promoted prospecting → qualification when contact phone captured.

stage.comment: Enum: prospecting | qualification | proposal | negotiation | closed_won | closed_lost

source.comment: Customer Source adapter code that created this opp: messenger | dino_tichdiem | user_points.

source_ref.comment: External primary key inside source. UNIQUE with `source`.

source_synced_at.comment: Last time adapter sync touched this row (for stale detection).

uniq_source_ref.comment: Idempotent upsert key for Customer Source adapter sync.

bizcity_crm_contacts.purpose: Unified contact entity. Primary CRM record across all channels (FB, Zalo, Web, IG, WA, Telegram, Email). Deduped by (email, phone, platform uid). v1.18.0 adds lead_score + segment for broadcast segmentation.

platform.comment: FACEBOOK | ZALO | WEBCHAT | WEB | EMAIL | IG | WA | TELEGRAM

segment.comment: A | B | C | VIP — broadcast audience classification

bizcity_crm_accounts.purpose: B2B company/account entity. Multiple contacts can belong to one account. B2B deals track account-level revenue.

bizcity_crm_inboxes.purpose: Inbox configuration per channel (one inbox = one page/OA/email account). Adapters register inboxes on connect. Admin can set auto_assignment, working hours link, SLA policy.

channel_type.comment: FACEBOOK | ZALO | WEBCHAT | TELEGRAM | IG | WA | EMAIL

channel_id.comment: Page ID / OA ID / email address

bizcity_crm_conversations.purpose: Omni-channel conversation (thread) between 1 contact and agents. One conversation = one continuous interaction session in inbox. Supports labels, custom attributes, SLA, snooze.

bizcity_crm_messages.purpose: Per-message log for a conversation. Stores inbound + outbound messages with platform metadata. Agent notes (private=1) visible only in admin.

author_id.comment: wp_user id; NULL for inbound platform messages

content_type.comment: text | image | audio | video | file | template | activity

bizcity_crm_labels.purpose: Global label definitions used to tag conversations. Color + identifier + description. M3.W1.

bizcity_crm_conversation_labels.purpose: Many-to-many join between conversations and labels. M3.W1.

bizcity_crm_custom_attribute_definitions.purpose: Admin-defined custom attribute schemas for conversations or contacts. M3.W3. Types: text | number | date | select | checkbox.

attr_type.comment: text | number | date | select | checkbox | phone | email | list | link

options_json.comment: JSON array of {value, label} for select type

bizcity_crm_macros.purpose: Saved message macros (canned responses) used by agents in the Composer. Supports {{token}} variables. M3.W5.

bizcity_crm_working_hours.purpose: Working hours schedule per inbox. Controls SLA pause/resume + auto-responder outside-hours. M4.W1.

closed_dates_json.comment: JSON array of YYYY-MM-DD holiday dates

bizcity_crm_sla_policies.purpose: SLA policy definitions. First response + resolution deadlines in seconds. M4.W2.

bizcity_crm_automation_rules.purpose: Automation rule definitions (trigger + conditions + actions). Evaluated by BizCity_CRM_Automation_Engine. M2.W5.

bizcity_crm_contracts.purpose: Contract lifecycle (draft → active → expired → terminated). Linked to opportunity + account + contact. Supports line items.

bizcity_crm_invoices.purpose: Invoice lifecycle (draft → sent → paid → overdue → voided → refunded). Full state machine in BizCity_CRM_Invoice_Repository. M-CRM.M2. v1.11.0 adds wc_order_id for Woo bridge (M-CRM.M8.W4).

status.comment: draft | sent | paid | overdue | voided | refunded

wc_order_id.comment: Woo order id link (nullable). Set by Woo Invoice Bridge auto-invoice or manual link.

bizcity_crm_invoice_lines.purpose: Invoice line items. Each row = one product/service on an invoice. Totals recomputed in BizCity_CRM_Invoice_Repository::replace_lines().

bizcity_crm_invoice_payments.purpose: Payment ledger per invoice. Multiple partial payments allowed. Triggers amount_paid / amount_due recompute. M-CRM.M2.W3.

method.comment: manual | bank_transfer | momo | vnpay | zalopay | payos | cash

gateway_txn.comment: Payment gateway transaction id for reconciliation

bizcity_crm_campaigns.purpose: Campaign definitions for QR/ref-link lead generation. Stores trigger keyword, action config, QR data, UTM params, visit counter. M6.W1.

qr_data_url.comment: Base64 PNG or SVG string of QR code

variants_json.comment: Phase 0.40 G1 — JSON array of {content, media_url, delay_ms} for multi-variant random campaign (Deplao parity).

bizcity_crm_campaign_visits.purpose: Per-visit ledger for campaign QR/link interactions. Tracks contact linkage, conversion, acquisition source for funnel analytics. M6.W3.

visitor_cookie.comment: Pre-link cookie for anonymous visit dedup

bizcity_crm_order_recap_log.purpose: Phase 0.38 W2 — Per-recap-send audit log. One row per attempted recap message. Tracks send status, platform, message_id, retry info. Enables resend-recap endpoint.

order_id.comment: Woo order id (wp_wc_orders.id for HPOS or wp_posts.ID for legacy)

gateway_msg_id.comment: Platform message_id returned by Gateway Sender

bizcity_crm_order_csat.purpose: Phase 0.38 W3 — Customer satisfaction feedback submitted via public order tracking page CSAT widget. 1-5 star rating + optional text comment.

bizcity_crm_shipment_status_log.purpose: Phase 0.38 W4 — Shipping status changelog detected by the cron tracker. One row per status change per order. Feeds shipment_update recap and public tracking timeline.

provider.comment: ghn | ghtk | vtp | jnt | best | other

new_status.comment: pending | confirmed | processing | shipped | in_transit | delivered | returned | failed

raw_payload.comment: Full meta snapshot from Woo at detection time

bizcity_crm_tasks.purpose: Internal task management for CRM operators. Linked to CRM entities (contacts, conversations, events). Phase 0.40 G1 adds checklist_json for sub-tasks (Deplao ERP parity).

status.comment: open | todo | doing | review | done | cancelled

checklist_json.comment: Phase 0.40 G1 — JSON array of {text, done} sub-task items (Deplao ERP board parity).

bizcity_crm_notes_doc.purpose: Phase 0.40 G1 — Internal document notes for operators. Folder-organised rich text notes with per-item share scope (private/team/public). Deplao ERP Note parity.

folder.comment: Logical grouping label — no FK, free-form.

tags_json.comment: JSON string array of tag labels.

bizcity_crm_admin_chat_audit.purpose: Phase 3.5 Wave C — Admin-chat audit log. Records every action attempted or executed via admin-chat grant (skill invocation, confirm-token flow, ingest, etc.) for security audit and non-repudiation. See PHASE-3.5-CRM-ADMIN.md Wave C.

chat_id.comment: Canonical chat_id that triggered the action.

grant_id.comment: FK bizcity_crm_chat_magic_links.id (or admin_chat_grants.id) — null for legacy.

action.comment: Skill slug or action identifier, e.g. ingest_document, post_facebook.

input_json.comment: Sanitised action input params (no PII). OWASP A09: no raw passwords/tokens.

result_json.comment: Outcome summary — success payload or error code. No full LLM output.

ip.comment: Requestor IP (OWASP A09 audit trail). IPv4/IPv6.

history.change: Baseline declaration of bizcity_crm_leads + bizcity_crm_opportunities. Existing schema as shipped in M-CRM.M1 (class-db-installer.php). Declared retroactively to satisfy R-DCL when v1.16.0 added Customer Source adapter columns.

Add Customer Source adapter columns + UNIQUE upsert keys. Bizcity_CRM_Pipeline_Sync now upserts opportunities (and back-fills leads) from 3 sources via the new `bizcity_crm_register_customer_sources` filter: (1) inbox Messenger conversations (FB) → stage=prospecting; (2) bizgpt-dino-tichdiem `wp_dino_users`; (3) user-points `wp_user_points`. New cols: opportunities.{source, source_ref, source_synced_at} + UNIQUE(source, source_ref); leads.{source_ref} + UNIQUE(source, source_ref). Auto-promotion: when contact.phone gets captured (or external row already has phone), the opp jumps prospecting → qualification (probability 10 → 25) without overwriting downstream stages (proposal/negotiation/closed_*). Migration: `migrate_phase_042()` ADD-only — safe via BizCity_Diagnostics_Auto_Create.

Add bizcity_crm_audit_log table (M-CRM.M1.W3). Captures create/update/delete actions on CRM entities (leads, opportunities, contracts, contacts) with before/after JSON diffs. New class BizCity_CRM_Audit_Log::log() + BizCity_CRM_Audit_Repository::find_by_entity(). REST GET /audit exposed for FE AuditTimeline component (replaces MOCK_AUDIT in SalesTab). Migration: migrate_phase_043() ADD-only.

M-CRM.M4.Inbox — Broadcast + lead classification sprint. (1) Add bizcity_crm_broadcasts table (broadcast job header: title, inbox_ids_json, segment_filter_json, template, status, schedule, counters). (2) Add bizcity_crm_broadcast_recipients table (per-recipient send ledger: broadcast_id, contact_id, conversation_id, status, sent_at, error). (3) Add contacts.lead_score TINYINT + contacts.segment VARCHAR(32) columns for A/B/C/VIP classification. (4) REST: POST /broadcasts (create job), GET /broadcasts, GET /broadcasts/{id}, POST /broadcasts/{id}/send, GET /broadcasts/{id}/recipients, POST /conversations/bulk-label. (5) FE: BroadcastTab, InboxConversationFilter enhanced (assignee_id, priority, q), lead score badge + segment pills in SalesTab/ContactsTab. Migration: migrate_phase_044() ADD-only.

R-DCL backfill — Phase 0.38 W1.1. Declare all tables shipped since v1.0.0 that were missing from this changelog: bizcity_crm_contacts (with lead_score/segment since 1.18.0), bizcity_crm_accounts, bizcity_crm_inboxes, bizcity_crm_conversations, bizcity_crm_messages, bizcity_crm_labels, bizcity_crm_conversation_labels, bizcity_crm_custom_attribute_definitions, bizcity_crm_macros, bizcity_crm_working_hours, bizcity_crm_sla_policies, bizcity_crm_automation_rules, bizcity_crm_contracts, bizcity_crm_invoices (with wc_order_id since 1.11.0), bizcity_crm_invoice_lines, bizcity_crm_invoice_payments, bizcity_crm_campaigns, bizcity_crm_campaign_visits. No new columns — retroactive declaration only. Validator compliant.

Phase 0.38 W1.2 — Add 3 new Order Fulfillment Hub tables: (1) bizcity_crm_order_recap_log — per-recap-send audit (W2, notifier); (2) bizcity_crm_order_csat — public tracking page CSAT feedback (W3); (3) bizcity_crm_shipment_status_log — shipping status change history detected by cron tracker (W4). Migration: migrate_phase_045() ADD-only via BizCity_CRM_DB_Installer_V2 dbDelta.

Phase 0.40 G1 — Deplao Parity schema foundation. (1) bizcity_crm_campaigns: ADD variants_json LONGTEXT — JSON array of {content, media_url, delay_ms} for multi-variant random campaign send (Deplao CampaignCreateModal parity). (2) bizcity_crm_tasks: retroactive declaration (existed since 1.0.0) + ADD checklist_json LONGTEXT for sub-task items (ERP task board parity). (3) NEW bizcity_crm_notes_doc — folder-organised internal notes with share_scope (private|team|public), tags_json, pinned (Deplao ErpNoteService parity). Migration: migrate_phase_046() ADD-only.

Phase 3.5 Wave C — NEW bizcity_crm_admin_chat_audit. Security audit log for every action attempted/executed via admin-chat grant (skill invocations, confirm-token flow, ingest, etc.). Columns: id, user_id, chat_id, guru_id, grant_id, action, status (attempted|success|denied|confirm_pending|confirm_expired), input_json (sanitised), result_json (no PII/token), ip, created_at. Indexed on (user_id,created_at), (chat_id,created_at), (action,status), (guru_id). Migration: migrate_phase_047() ADD-only.

Phase 0.43 — Broadcast Mass-Send Deplao Parity 2. (1) bizcity_crm_broadcasts: ADD action_flags_json LONGTEXT — JSON {send_message, send_friend_request, invite_group, group_id} for action-type broadcast (Tin nhan / Ket ban / Moi nhom / Hon hop). NULL = fallback {send_message:true}. ADD delay_sec SMALLINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 5 — per-send delay 5-180s. (2) bizcity_crm_broadcast_recipients: ADD scheduled_send_at DATETIME NULL — per-recipient time = enqueue_time + (idx * delay_sec); Dispatcher filters WHERE scheduled_send_at <= NOW(). ADD INDEX idx_scheduled_send ON (status, scheduled_send_at). (3) Dispatcher extension: pick_variant_full() with weighted random + images[] + friend_invite_text; tick() filter by scheduled_send_at; send_one() dispatch per action_flag. Migration: migrate_phase_048() ADD-only.
